corresponding air-standard Otto cycle, and the mechanical efficiency is 90%, then the specific fuel consumption _________ g/MJ of brake work. The specific heat capacity ratio for air is 1.4.
(Correct upto one decimal place).

NAT
Correct answer: 83.9
Solution

83.9 (82.5 - 84.5)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following are the most widely accepted causes for hydrocarbon emissions in exhaust gases of spark ignition engine?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a, b, c, d)
(a) Flame quenching at the combustion chamber walls, leaving a layer of unburned fuel air mixture
adjacent to the walls.
(b) Crevices in the combustion chamber, small volumes with narrow entrances, which are filled
with the unburned mixture during compression and remains unburned after flame passages.
(c) The oil film and deposits on the cylinder walls absorbs fuel during intake and compression,
and the fuel vapour is desorbed into the cylinder during expansion and exhaust.
(d) Incomplete combustion, either partial burning or complete misfire, occurring when the gas
combustion quality is poor, e.g. during engine transients when air-fuel, exhaust gas
recirculation, and spark timing may not be adequately controlled.

then the capacity of the refrigeration plant and mass flow rate of the refrigerant are
Take: cp = 4.187 kJ/kgK for water, cp = 2 kJ/kgK for ice,
Latent heat of fusion of ice = 335 kJ/kg, Sensible enthalpy at 40°C = 600 kJ/kg,
Enthalpy of saturated vapour at (–15°C) = 1675 kJ/kg.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q21 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The process in a hot water spray washer maintained at a temperature of 50°C through which unsaturated air at 10°C DBT and 50% RH passes, is

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
The temperature of water spray is more than the DBT of moist air, therefore it will be a heating
process. Also, the moist air is unsaturated therefore humidification will also takes place.

Q22 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following factors increase detonation in the SI engine?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a, d)
Any factor which reduces the temperature of unburnt charge should reduce the possibility of
detonation. Any factor which increase flame speed will reduce know. Alternatively, knock can be
reduced by reducing the distance to be travelled by the flame. Hence, correct options are (a) and
(d) only.

Q28 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following are the functions of the drum in water tube boiler?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
Functions of drum in boilers are
1. To store water and steam sufficiently to meet varying load requirement.
2. To provide enough surface area for liquid-vapour disengagement.
3. To maintain a certain desired ppm in drum.
4. To aid in circulation.
5. To separate vapour or steam from water-steam mixture.
